brandVoiceDescription: Direct, unflinching, and empathetic. We don't sugarcoat the data but we never shame. We speak peer-to-peer, not top-down. Every stat gets a source. We center real stories from real people.
toneGuidelines: Lead with a surprising stat or personal hook
Always cite sources for health claims
Keep it under 30 seconds for short-form
End with a clear call to action or resource link
visualGuidelines: Electric blue (#2b6bff) + dark navy + white. Bold sans-serif. High contrast for mobile readability.
typographyGuidelines: Headlines: Space Grotesk Bold 28-36px. Body: Inter Regular 16px. Stats: Space Grotesk Medium 48px.
photographyGuidelines: Real people, real situations. No stock photos. Documentary-style. Diverse ages 18-30. Urban and campus settings.
